form.formComment: Returns from a 46-day let-up. Last start won by 0.7 len at Morphettville Parks Bm62 February 28 over 1550m on a soft track defeating Crespiano with 58kg at $26. form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Not raced for 37 days. form.formComment: Resuming today after a break of five months. Finished off last preparation by 0.8 len New Plymouth Raceway Mdn November 21 over 2000m slow track defeating Del Inquent carrying 58.5kg at $4.90. When resuming last campaign ran last of 9 at Hawera Mdn October 4 over 1600m, on rain affected going; 41 len behind Crafty Colin with 58.5kg at $3.80. Expected to feature.
